feedback: Full-tab view approved. Left 400px timeline (grouped Today/Yesterday/Last Week), right large preview pane with actual spread thumbnails. Much better use of canvas than drawer.
direction: Left pane: search input with ⌘F, date-grouped entries with rust dot markers, selected entry has cream bg + rust left border. Right pane: 'Issue 47 at [timestamp]' display serif + 'Restore this version' outlined-rust button top-right, spread thumbnails showing snapshot state as read-only miniature.
ai_drift_notes: IMPORTANT: sidebar nav items are wrong ('Dashboard / Issues / Content / Media / Layouts / Authors / History / Settings'). IGNORE this — use the 8-tab IA from DESIGN.md: Issue Board / Articles / Classifieds / Ads / Images / Templates / History / Settings. Also 'TEDAY' typo should be 'TODAY'. 'History' is the ACTIVE tab (left-accent bar).
